summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOMASSAGE WELLNESS CYPRUS website. Backend APIs are functional with minor validation issues. Frontend renders correctly with trilingual support, but has mobile interaction conflicts due to overlay elements.

validation_issues.issue: Accepts invalid data (empty name, short phone numbers) without validation
validation_issues.impact: Allows creation of leads with poor data quality

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile CTA bar and header elements overlay form submit button, preventing clicks

integration_issues.issue: No clear success message visible after form submission

design_issues.issue: No visible play buttons or controls found for video testimonials

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns correct response
Lead creation API accepts valid data and returns proper JSON with UUID
Lead retrieval API returns list of created leads
Website loads correctly with proper header, navigation, and sections
Trilingual language switching (RU/EN/EL) works without page reload
Hero section displays with trust badges and CTA buttons
About section with animated stat counters (4 counters found)
Services section with 8 treatment tabs - tab switching works
Pricing section with 4 cards and subscription toggle functionality
Navigation smooth scroll to sections works
Mobile responsive design with working mobile menu
External links present: 7 Dikidi, 7 WhatsApp, 4 phone, 4 Instagram links
Cookie consent banner appears and can be accepted
OPEN/CLOSED status badge displays in header

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Most features work, overlay issues on mobile

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile overlay interaction issues (HIGH priority) - mobile CTA bar intercepts form clicks. Add backend input validation for lead creation. Improve form submission success feedback visibility. Add video testimonial play controls if needed.
